title: [MTR] WIN350 | Class 500-900 Shinkansen
description: Class 500-900 "WIN350" Shinkansen addon for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the WIN350 (Class 500-900) experimental train to the game.

By default, doors do not open at stations due to the nature of this train.

All six cars are provided.
Cars #2 and #3 have two versions: One that adds a third pantograph to the train, and one without it.

Additionally, cars #1 and #6 have a variant for museums without the pantograph shroud, as it's quite massive.

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

**Please enjoy it!**
![WIN350](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/505f58ff3cd9052d3d1e5a3d4df21f304806aabd.jpeg)
